snippet.title: ELOHIM - Dunsin Oyekan #dunsinoyekan
snippet.description:
Elohim, a sound that embodies the essence of His Majesty, the fullness of His power, and His supreme authority. He shows up and every other spirit bows.

Elohim is the first Name for God in the Bible, the first sentence in Genesis states that "In the beginning God (Elohim) created the heavens and the earth"  Genesis 1:1. In that opening verse, the Majesty of the uncreated Creator was announced. This is no coincidence that from the very beginning, the Bible points to God's greatness, authority and power. 

At the sight of Elohim, worship rises instinctively in the hearts of His beloved and all creation.

There's Glory on this sound!!!

For the Lord your God is God of gods and Lord of lords, the great God, mighty and awesome, who shows no partiality nor takes a bribe.  He is your praise, and He is your God, who has done for you these great and awesome things which your eyes have seen.  Deuteronomy 10:17, 21

Track 8 on the New Wine Album (2026) https://found.ee/NewWine

snippet.title: DJ Ab - Shiga (Ya bi jiki) {Official Video}
snippet.description:
“Shiga” (which means Enter) started as a raw freestyle I casually dropped on my IG story. The response was instant — people connected with the energy and kept asking me to turn it into a full song. So I did.

In this track, I talk my talk. It’s a lamba about the journey — the struggle, the hunger, and the nights nobody saw before the doors finally opened. “Shiga” is me stepping into my moment, reminding everyone that every success has a story behind it. If you know what it means to suffer before shining, this one is for you.

snippet.title: Blaqbonez - HUSTLE KPA$$$ (Official Visualizer)
snippet.description:
Blaqbonez turns the clock back to where it all began in the official music video for “Hustle Kpa” featuring Artsalghul.

On this hard-hitting record, the Chocolate City star strips away the theatrics and reconnects with the raw hunger that fueled his rise from underground battle rapper to one of Africa’s most dynamic hip-hop voices. “Hustle Kpa” is a powerful reminder that before the success, the streams, and the spotlight, there was grit, sacrifice, and relentless hustle.

Serving as the lead single from the forthcoming No Excuses (Deluxe), the track extends the story of his fifth studio album No Excuses, released in October 2025. The project has already surpassed 100 million cumulative streams, powered by standout records like “ACL” and “Despacito” featuring FOLA, each crossing the 10 million mark and cementing the album’s cultural impact.

While No Excuses celebrates the wins, “Hustle Kpa” zooms in on the grind that made it all possible.
Over a streetwise, hard-edged beat, Blaqbonez delivers with urgency and intent, echoing memories of sleepless nights, overlooked talent, and an unshakable belief in his craft. 

Artsalghul complements the energy with a gripping performance that reinforces the song’s core message: success is built on unseen effort, consistency, and resilience.

Hustle Kpa is a statement for anyone still on the journey.
Watch, share, and remember: the hustle never lies.

YOUNG PREACHER - https://Blaqbonez.lnk.to/YoungPreacherOM

About Blaqbonez:
Blaqbonez (born Akumefule Chukwuemeka George) is a Nigerian rapper and singer-songwriter known for his chops as an audacious lyricist, energetic flow, and witty wordplay. Signed to Chocolate City Music, the self-proclaimed, "Best Rapper in Africa" (BRIA), grew to mainstream consciousness in 2019 and has since solidified his place in the industry meshing his Igbo, Yoruba and Urhobo cultural upbringing with music influences from Afropop, trap, and hip hop, to electronic music. He was recognised by The New York Times as one of the "new guards" of Nigerian music in the same year. 

“Mr Bombastic EP” (named after his Caribbean alter-ego) debuted at #1 on iTunes, and in March 2020, his single, “Haba”, was released to wide public acclaim. In 2021, his debut album “Sex Over Love” earned him the #1 Album in Nigeria on Apple for three consecutive weeks; #1 Song in Nigeria - Apple for one week; #2 Top 100 Songs - Deezer; #2 Top Played Song in Nigeria - Radio Monitor Charts and  Debuted in the Billboard - Next Big Sound Charts with the lead single "Bling" His subsequent projects, “Young Preacher” and “Emeka Must Shine” as well as his seamless collaborations with a range of artists like Amaarae, Ludacris, Zlatan, ODUMODUBLVCK. Lojay, Blxckie, and more testify to his prowess as one of Africa’s most formidable hip-hop acts.

Subscribe to Blaqbonez's channel for all the best and latest official music videos, albums, behind the scenes, live performances and more!

snippet.title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: SINKING SAND (2026) – Powerful Nollywood Drama | Full Movie Trailer
snippet.description:
A neglected wife. A forbidden student. One impulsive kiss that turns into blackmail, betrayal, and cold-blooded murder.

Welcome to "SINKING SAND", a gripping Psychological Domestic Thriller & Erotic Suspense 
Written by Edmund Duru, Directed by Pascal Amanfo and Produced by Chibuisi C. Okorieimoh and Happy Omenka.

In a luxurious but empty home, Rachel Adenuga battles loneliness while her husband, Bayo, chases wealth and another woman. Desperate for purpose and connection, she begins tutoring students… until a dangerous attraction with her 18-year-old student, Segun, spirals out of control.
What starts as a moment of weakness quickly becomes a deadly secret. With a scheming maid (Fola) watching every move, a pregnant mistress on the side, and guilt closing in, Rachel finds herself sinking deeper into a trap of her own making.
The more she struggles… the deeper she goes.

A story about loneliness, lust, betrayal, blackmail, and the devastating cost of hidden desires.
Would you risk everything for one moment of feeling alive?

Written by: Edmund Duru
Directed by: Pascal Amanfo
Produced by: Happy Omenka
Executive Producer: Chibuisi C. Okorieimoh (DrNasNuggets)
Genre: Psychological Thriller | Domestic Suspense | Erotic Thriller | Crime Drama
starring: Daniel Abua, Onyeka Mercy

Like | Comment | Share if you love intense psychological thrillers!

Which character do you think is the most dangerous: Rachel, Segun, Fola, or Bayo? Drop your prediction below 👇
